data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimized options to reduce cognitive overload and enhance user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Simple, streamlined navigation and focused content display.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design that facilitates user interaction by optimizing the distance required to complete tasks.
data.technical_spec: Large call-to-action buttons and intuitive accessibility.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Chunked information to conform with user memory limits.
data.technical_spec: Categories, genres, and groupings to manage content presentation.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leverages user familiarity by using standard interface norms.
data.technical_spec: Adoption of widely recognized symbols and interaction patterns.

data.title: Law of Prägnanz
data.description: Optimized so users perceive visuals in the simplest form possible.
data.technical_spec: Clean interface design with clear color contrasts and minimalism.
